text:
Golden Dictionary (黄金辞典) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. This dictionary provides words you should learn for the next day.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Golden Dictionary 黄金辞典 - This card summons forth a dictionary that highlights a word in gold everyday. It would be wise to memorize the word because the next day it will be very useful. If used everyday, your vocabulary is sure to be a work of art before too long. It may help you smooth talk your way through some tough spots.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.012 - 黄金辞典 
持ち主にとって得になる言葉を教えてくれる辞典。辞典を開き、黄金色に輝いている言葉を見つけてその意味を覚えておくと、次の日必ず役に立つ。
|-
![Eng]
|No.012 - Golden Dictionary 
The dictionary tells special words to the owner. Open the dictionary to find the meaning of the word. The words that appear gold, will always be useful the next day.
|}
